fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the action.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the action.

fields.name: Order
fields.tooltip: Specifies the order in which the actions will be performed.

fields.name: Stop on Error
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the job should stop if an error occurs during this action. If not selected, the job will attempt to process all records and actions.
